description_long: This is a compact, wall-mounted sink fixture with a rectangular white ceramic basin and a single central faucet. The sink is supported by a single black metal pipe that extends vertically from the underside of the basin to the floor, with visible plumbing beneath. Above the basin, a large, rectangular, dark-colored mirror is mounted, providing a reflective surface for users. The faucet is metallic and centrally positioned, with a drain located at the center of the basin. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for public restrooms or urban wash areas. The materials and construction suggest durability and ease of maintenance in high-traffic environments.
description: A compact, wall-mounted white ceramic sink with a central faucet, black metal support pipe, and a large rectangular mirror above. The design is minimalistic and functional, ideal for urban public spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular basin, central faucet, black support pipe, and the full mirror above.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the basin, the vertical support pipe, and the exposed plumbing beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the large rectangular mirror and the back edge of the basin, with the support pipe visible below.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the basin's profile, support pipe, and plumbing details.
